compressed_prompt: Generate a forum thread about several people waiting to hear the latest local news. All sentences should be short. Refrain from using any commas. Use placeholders to represent different usernames. Use square brackets for placeholders, like [username1], [username2]. Please include at least 20 placeholders in the thread.
response:
**Thread: Town Hall Announcement Today?**

**Posted by: [NewsWatcher]**

Any updates yet?
The mayor promised big news.
I am so nervous.
My phone is almost dead.

**Reply by: [Local_Guru]**

The stream is not live.
[CheckBackSoon] said 3 PM.
It is 3:07 now.
Typical delay.

[WorriedParent] heard school changes.
[ShopOwnerDave] thinks taxes.
[GardenerMae] hopes park funding.
We all just wait.

Refresh refresh refresh.
This is agony.
[EagerBeaver] see anything?
[SilentMike] knows something.

I am at the square.
Crowd is growing.
[ReporterJen] is here.
[OldTom] looks worried.
